testcase.classname: 2255 CMS Geolocation feature � Allow pricing info by countries
testcase.name: SG User views CUBEforall website and bundle plan A on product page

testcase.failure:
Given go to main web........................................................passed Given press sign in button..................................................passed And registration with new account and try login singapore...................passed And will redirected to suggested company list which match with domain name of the users.passed When system didn't found the suggested company matched......................passed And input company name "mailinatorCCNPEGASUS_QA"............................failed And input company registration "CCNPEGASUS_QA1".............................skipped And input company type "GSA"................................................skipped And input country "SG - SINGAPORE"..........................................skipped And input city "SIN"........................................................skipped And theres button to create company with the status was enabled to create company.skipped Then the user was able to create a new company..............................skipped When press create company button............................................skipped And input contact details IATA membership number "00000001".................skipped And input contact details CASS number "11111111"............................skipped And input registered office address "101 Cantonment road" for company detail.skipped And input post code "089774" for company detail.............................skipped And input company email "qa-ccn-22869@mailinator.com" for company detail....skipped And input mobile number detail company "1111111111" for company detail......skipped And input mailing address complete from same as registered company address..skipped And input contact details name "gsa sg 1"...................................skipped And input contact details designation "marketing"...........................skipped And input contact details mobile no "081234567891"..........................skipped And input contact details email "qa-ccn-22869@mailinator.com"...............skipped And press submit create company.............................................skipped Then will displayed pop up for post payment setup...........................skipped And click proceed pop up button for creating company to the post payment....skipped And click ok button from pop up confirmation that tells GIRO setup instructions has been sent to email.skipped Then finally successfully to the setup post payment.........................skipped And receive email notification giro setup...................................skipped Given "User A" click product tab to subscribe to product....................skipped And Select plan "Plan A" "Bundle (LFS BC) Company
